scope: national popular vote + abstentions for US presidential elections 2008-2024
purpose: Evaluation targets only. NOT for tuning the model.
primary_denominator: VEP (Voting-Eligible Population) per US Elections Project / UF Election Lab
fallback_denominator: Census CPS CVAP if VEP source unavailable for a year
convention_no_invented_numbers: Cells where exact value cannot be locally verified are null with needs_source: true.
phase_2_2_followon_update_summary: All FEC presidential vote totals (D, R, Other, Total) directly verified from cached FEC PDFs for all 5 years (2008-2024). UF Election Lab per-year CSVs added for 2012/2016/2020 — VEP, abstentions, and per-year share-of-VEP metrics now derivable for 4 of 5 years. 2008 VEP remains unverified; UF per-year archive does not extend back to 2008G.
source_hierarchy: FEC official presidential vote totals (cached PDFs)
US Elections Project / UF Election Lab VEP (cached CSVs)
Census CPS Voting and Registration Supplement (secondary)
CES/CCES (primary respondent-level survey microdata, separate file)

cached_source_files.note: All cached locally under data/backtest-sources/ — NOT committed to repo per global rules.

ufl_methodology_caveat: UF's VEP_TURNOUT_RATE column is computed as ballots-counted / VEP, slightly higher than the presidential-vote-only rate since some voters undervote the presidential race. The benchmark backtest uses the presidential-vote-only rate (FEC presidential votes / UF VEP) since the simulator predicts presidential vote choice. The two diverge by ~0.5-1.0pp depending on year.

2008.d_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — federalelections2008.pdf page 5 (2008 Presidential Popular Vote Summary)
2008.r_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — federalelections2008.pdf page 5
2008.other_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — federalelections2008.pdf page 6 'All Others' Total row (1.42%)
2008.total_presidential_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — federalelections2008.pdf page 5 (Total row)
2008.vep_count_verification: US Elections Project verified — https://www.electproject.org/2008g (United States row, VEP column). USEP / Michael McDonald is the authoritative VEP source for the pre-UF-archive period.
2008.vote_for_highest_office_usep_note: USEP 2008G spreadsheet 'Highest Office' value. Differs from FEC's 131,313,820 by 9,089. For backtest scoring, FEC total is the numerator and USEP VEP is the denominator.
2008.turnout_uf_ballots_based_verification: USEP 2008G 'VEP Highest Office' column matches UF aggregate CSV (US_VEP_Turnout_Rates_v1.2.csv row YEAR=2008)
2008.notes: High-turnout cycle. D wins both popular vote and EC. Other includes Nader 739,034; Barr (LBT) 523,715; Baldwin (CON) 199,750; McKinney (GRE) 161,797.

2012.d_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — 2012pres.pdf page 5 (2012 Presidential Popular Vote Summary)
2012.total_presidential_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — 2012pres.pdf page 5 (Total row)
2012.vep_count_verification: UF Election Lab CSV verified — Turnout_2012G_v1.0.csv 'United States' row VEP column
2012.vote_for_highest_office_uf_note: Differs from FEC's 129,085,410 by 14,504. FEC official presidential vote total is authoritative.
2012.turnout_uf_ballots_based_verification: UF Election Lab CSV verified — VEP_TURNOUT_RATE column

2016.d_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — federalelections2016.pdf page 5 (2016 Presidential Popular Vote Summary)
2016.r_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — federalelections2016.pdf page 5
2016.other_votes_verification: derived = 136,669,276 − 65,853,514 − 62,984,828 (D, R, Total all FEC-verified). Notable: Johnson (LBT) 4,489,341; Stein (GRE) 1,457,218; McMullin 731,991.
2016.total_presidential_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — federalelections2016.pdf page 5 (Total row)
2016.vep_count_verification: UF Election Lab CSV verified — Turnout_2016G_v1.0.csv 'United States' row VEP column
2016.vote_for_highest_office_uf_note: Differs from FEC's 136,669,276 by 84,660. FEC official presidential vote total is authoritative.
2016.turnout_uf_ballots_based_verification: UF Election Lab CSV verified — VEP_TURNOUT_RATE column
2016.notes: D wins popular vote, R wins EC. CCES 2016 microdata available locally for backtest.

2020.d_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — 2020presgeresults.pdf page 2 (Total row, 51.31%)
2020.r_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — 2020presgeresults.pdf page 8 (Total row, 46.86%)
2020.other_votes_verification: derived = 158,383,403 − 81,268,924 − 74,216,154 (D, R, Total all FEC-verified). Notable: Jorgensen (LBT) 1,865,724; Hawkins (GRE) 405,035.
2020.total_presidential_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — 2020presgeresults.pdf page 8 ('TOTAL VOTES' Total row)
2020.vep_count_verification: UF Election Lab CSV verified — Turnout_2020G_v1.1.csv 'United States' row VEP column
2020.ballots_minus_pres_votes_explanation: Difference UF total ballots − FEC presidential votes. Downballot-only voters / presidential undervotes.
2020.turnout_uf_ballots_based_verification: UF Election Lab CSV verified — VEP_TURNOUT_RATE column
2020.turnout_uf_ballots_based_aggregate_csv_n: The 1948-2022 aggregate CSV (US_VEP_Turnout_Rates_v1.2.csv) reports 0.6638 for 2020. The per-year file's 0.6599 is more current; differences likely reflect VEP refinements between releases. Backtest uses presidential-derived rate below.
2020.notes: Highest VEP turnout in over a century.

2024.d_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — page 3 of Official 2024 Presidential General Election Results

other_votes_breakdown_partial.note: Partial breakdown from FEC PDF; full per-candidate splits available across pages 2-6 of cached PDF

2024.total_presidential_votes_verification: FEC PDF directly verified — page 6 'Total Votes' Total row
2024.vep_count_verification: UF Election Lab CSV verified — Turnout_2024G_v0.4.csv 'United States' row
2024.turnout_uf_ballots_based_verification: UF Election Lab CSV verified — VEP_TURNOUT_RATE column
2024.turnout_presidential_vep_verification: derived = 155,238,302 / 243,803,423 — THIS is the rate to use for the backtest since predictions are on FEC presidential votes
2024.notes: First R popular-vote win since 2004. Notable third-party: Kennedy 756,393, De La Cruz 166,175, West 82,644, Stein, Oliver, etc.

phase_2_2_followon_gains: All FEC vote totals (D, R, Other, Total) now PDF-verified for all 5 years (replacing search-snippet values)
VEP filled for all 5 years (2012/2016/2020 from UF per-year CSVs; 2008 from US Elections Project / electproject.org/2008g)
Abstentions, turnout-presidential, and per-year share-of-VEP metrics computed for all 5 years
2020 D/R/Total numbers refined from FEC PDF (Biden 81,268,924 vs prior snippet 81,268,773; Trump 74,216,154 vs prior 74,216,728; Total 158,383,403 vs prior approx 158,400,000)

comparison_anchors_runnable_years.note: All five years fully runnable for all 9 backtest evaluation metrics.
